productDisplayName: SPYKAR Men Slim Fit Free Republic Wheeler Spirit Blue Jeans
description: Composition Blue jeans with a washed and heavily distressed look made of 100% cotton, has two insert pockets on the front, two patch pockets on the back with embroidered star on the right back pocket, brand name printed on the waistband at the back and metal zipper and button closure on the front Fit Low waist, tight fit Wash care Wash and dry separately Wash inside out in mild detergent Do not iron to retain the creasing effect Dry under shade Look cool and casual in these washed blue denim jeans from the Rico collection of spykar. The heavily disrtressed look and the creasing effect gives a truly individual style. Team this pair with grunge tees and Sports boots or canvas shoes and make a style statement wherever you go. Model statistics The model wears jeans of length 41.5" Height: 6.1' Waist: 31"
